name: Kanboard JSON-RPC API
description: Kanboard is an open-source project management tool using Kanban methodology. The API uses JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol over HTTP POST. All API calls are made to a single endpoint with the method name specified in the request body. This spec documents the JSON-RPC methods as individual OpenAPI operations for discoverability.
